title: erigeron cervinus
intro: Erigeron cervinus, also known as the beaked hawk's-beard or beaked wood's rose, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron cervinus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the flowers and leaves of the plant.
